title: Standard Label Definitions
description: Canonical GitHub label definitions for WorkspaceToolkit repos (docs/standard-labels.json). Consumed by the standardize-labels skill at runtime.

$schema.description: URL of this schema, enabling editor autocomplete and validation.

description.description: Summary of what this label set is and how it is used.

categories.description: The label categories. Each label's 'category' must match one of these names.

name.description: Category identifier, referenced by each label's 'category' field.

description.description: What this category of labels conveys.

name.description: Label name as it appears in GitHub.

category.description: The category this label belongs to; must match a 'categories' entry's name.

default.description: Whether this is a stock GitHub default label (retained with a consistent color) rather than a custom one.
